headline: Global Next Generation Sequencing Services Market Size/Share Worth USD 56.1 Billion by 2035 at a 23.5% CAGR: Healthcare Foresights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth Rate, SWOT Analysis)

headline: Piper Sandler Initiates Coverage On Agilent Technologies with Neutral Rating, Announces Price Target of $150
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst David Westenberg   initiates coverage on Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) with a Neutral rating and announces Price Target of $150.
